de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class BuiltInRuleAppContainer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.RuleAppContainer
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.BuiltInRuleAppContainer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Comparable<RuleAppContainer>

    public class BuiltInRuleAppContainer
extends RuleAppContainer
    Instances of this class are immutable

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private PosInOccurrence applicationPosition 
      private IBuiltInRuleApp bir 
      private FormulaTag positionTag
      The position of the rule app in two different representations: positionTag denotes the concerned formula and survives modifications of the sequent and of parts of the formula, and applicationPosition is the original position for which the rule app was created

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private BuiltInRuleAppContainer(IBuiltInRuleApp bir, PosInOccurrence pio, RuleAppCost cost, Goal goal) 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      RuleApp completeRuleApp(Goal goal)
      Create a RuleApp that is suitable to be applied or null.
      (package private) static RuleAppContainer createAppContainer(IBuiltInRuleApp bir, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal)
      Create container for RuleApp.
      ImmutableList<RuleAppContainer> createFurtherApps(Goal goal)
      Create a list of new RuleAppContainers that are to be considered for application.
      (package private) static ImmutableList<RuleAppContainer> createInitialAppContainers(ImmutableList<IBuiltInRuleApp> birs, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal)
      Create container for RuleApp.
      private PosInOccurrence getPosInOccurrence(Goal p_goal)
      Copied from FindTaclet.
      private boolean isStillApplicable(Goal goal)

    • Field Detail

      • positionTag

        private final FormulaTag positionTag
        The position of the rule app in two different representations: positionTag denotes the concerned formula and survives modifications of the sequent and of parts of the formula, and applicationPosition is the original position for which the rule app was created

      • applicationPosition

        private final PosInOccurrence applicationPosition

      • bir

        private final IBuiltInRuleApp bir

    • Constructor Detail

        private BuiltInRuleAppContainer(IBuiltInRuleApp bir,

                       RuleAppCost cost,
                       Goal goal)

    • Method Detail

      • isStillApplicable

        private boolean isStillApplicable(Goal goal)
        Returns:
        true iff the stored rule app is applicable for the given sequent, i.e. if the bound position does still exist (if-formulas are not considered)

      • getPosInOccurrence

        private PosInOccurrence getPosInOccurrence(Goal p_goal)
        Copied from FindTaclet.

      • createAppContainer

        static RuleAppContainer createAppContainer(IBuiltInRuleApp bir,
                                  PosInOccurrence pio,
                                  Goal goal)
        Create container for RuleApp.
        Returns:
        container for the currently applicable BuiltInRuleApp, the cost may be an instance of TopRuleAppCost.

      • createInitialAppContainers

        static ImmutableList<RuleAppContainer> createInitialAppContainers(ImmutableList<IBuiltInRuleApp> birs,
                                                         PosInOccurrence pio,
                                                         Goal goal)
        Create container for RuleApp.
        Returns:
        container for the currently applicable BuiltInRuleApp, the cost may be an instance of TopRuleAppCost.

      • createFurtherApps

        public ImmutableList<RuleAppContainer> createFurtherApps(Goal goal)
        Description copied from class: RuleAppContainer
        Create a list of new RuleAppContainers that are to be considered for application.
